description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and caches the user home .cache directory. Define a single stage named test. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, overrides the image to registry.gitlab.com/alex-oleshkevich/base-python:latest, sets DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE to sample.settings, and executes the shell commands: pip install -e ., cd __testproject/, coverage run ./manage.py test arasari --no-input, and coverage report. The job also captures test coverage using the regex /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/ and has no artifacts or special rules.
